backend/main.mo: Main Motoko actor defining data types (UserProfile, ScienceNote, GameState, HighScore, MemoryTestHighScore) and CRUD endpoints for user profiles, science chapter notes, game states, and high scores with role-based access control.
backend/migration.mo: Migration module that converts old actor state (without memoryTest game type) to new actor state by adding the #memoryTest variant to GameType and initializing new memoryTestHighScores and memoryTestState fields.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report mapping implemented features (useMemoryTest hook, MemoryTestGame page, routing/homepage card, difficulty config) to their source files, components, and test IDs with confidence ratings.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: Auto-generated JSON summary document describing the purpose of each frontend source file, serving as a reference index for the frontend codebase.
frontend/index.css: Root CSS file importing Tailwind directives and defining CSS custom properties for the design system's color tokens in both light and dark modes.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point with SEO meta tags, Open Graph/Twitter cards, PWA manifest link, structured JSON-LD data, and app icons for the Memory Increase brain training game.
frontend/public/manifest.json: PWA web app manifest defining app name, icons, theme colors, display mode, and shortcuts for card matching and progress pages.
frontend/public/service-worker.js: PWA service worker that caches static assets on install, cleans old caches on activate, and uses cache-first for static assets and network-first for HTML/scripts with offline fallback.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Defines the TanStack Router route tree for all app pages (home, games, progress, install guide) and renders the RouterProvider with a shared Layout.
frontend/src/components/Card.tsx: A single memory card component that renders a flip animation between a card-back image and the card's value, disabling interaction when flipped or matched.
frontend/src/components/CardGrid.tsx: Renders a responsive CSS grid of Card components for the card-matching game, delegating click handling to the parent.
frontend/src/components/GameCard.tsx: A UI card component for the home screen that displays a game's icon, title, description, current level, and a Play button.
frontend/src/components/GameControls.tsx: Renders Restart and Home buttons for in-game controls, navigating back to the root route on Home click.
frontend/src/components/GameScore.tsx: A modal dialog shown on game completion that displays time, moves, and a calculated score with Play Again and Menu actions.
frontend/src/components/Layout.tsx: App shell with a sticky header (logo, Progress link, login/logout via Internet Identity), an Outlet for page content, and a footer.
frontend/src/components/PatternGrid.tsx: Renders a grid of toggle cells for the pattern memory game, showing the target pattern during memorize phase and the user's input during input phase.
frontend/src/components/SequenceItem.tsx: A single button cell for the sequence memory game that visually highlights active and selected states.
frontend/src/components/SlidingTile.tsx: Renders a single tile in the sliding puzzle, displaying either an empty placeholder or a numbered gradient button.
frontend/src/components/StroopDisplay.ts: Displays a color word in a mismatched ink color and four color-selection buttons for the Stroop effect game.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Custom hook that creates and caches an authenticated or anonymous ICP backend actor via TanStack Query, invalidating dependent queries whenever the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useCardGame.ts: Custom hook managing a card-matching memory game, handling card generation, flip logic, match detection, move counting, and game completion based on a difficulty-configured grid size.
frontend/src/hooks/useGameTimer.ts: Custom hook providing a stopwatch-style timer with start, stop, and reset controls, tracking elapsed time via a 100ms interval.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Custom hook and React context provider for Internet Computer Internet Identity authentication, exposing login/logout functions, identity state, and login status.
frontend/src/hooks/useMemoryTest.ts: Custom hook managing a memory test game where players memorize a set of emoji objects then recall them by typing, with timed memorize and recall phases and win/loss detection.
frontend/src/hooks/usePatternMemory.ts: Custom hook for a grid-based pattern memory game where a random pattern is briefly shown, then the player must reproduce it, tracking attempts and completion state.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Provides React Query hooks for fetching player game state and high scores from the backend actor, and a mutation hook for submitting completed level results.
frontend/src/hooks/useScoreCalculation.t: Utility hook that calculates a final score based on time taken, number of moves, and level, applying time/move penalties and a level multiplier.
frontend/src/hooks/useSequenceMemory.ts: Custom hook for a sequence memory game where a random emoji sequence is displayed one item at a time and the player must reproduce it in order, tracking attempts and completion.
frontend/src/hooks/useSlidingPuzzle.ts: Custom hook managing a sliding tile puzzle game, generating solvable shuffled boards, handling tile movement, move counting, and completion detection based on difficulty-configured grid size.
frontend/src/hooks/useStroopEffect.ts: Custom React hook managing Stroop Effect game state, including color pair generation, a countdown timer, answer handling, scoring, and game reset logic.
frontend/src/hooks/useTranslation.ts: Empty file, likely a placeholder for a translation/i18n hook.
frontend/src/i18n/translations.ts: Empty file, likely a placeholder for i18n translation strings.
frontend/src/index.css: Global CSS file that sets up Tailwind directives and defines CSS custom properties for a brain-training themed design system with light and dark mode color tokens.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that renders the React app wrapped with QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider.
frontend/src/pages/CardMatchingGame.tsx: Card matching game page that manages game state, a timer, and saves completion results to the backend via the useCompleteLevel hook.
frontend/src/pages/HomePage.tsx: Home page displaying a hero section and a grid of GameCard components for all available brain-training games, with navigation to each game and a PWA install guide.
frontend/src/pages/InstallGuide.tsx: Static page providing step-by-step instructions for installing the app as a PWA on Chrome (desktop and mobile).
frontend/src/pages/LanguageSelectionPage: Empty file, likely a placeholder for a language selection page.
frontend/src/pages/MemoryTestGame.tsx: Memory test game page that handles memorize and recall phases, user input, scoring, and saves results to the backend on game completion.
frontend/src/pages/NotesPage.tsx: Empty file, likely a placeholder for a notes page.
frontend/src/pages/PatternMemoryGame.tsx: Page component for the Pattern Memory game that manages game phases (display/input), tracks elapsed time, handles pattern submission, and records level completion to the backend on success.
frontend/src/pages/ProgressPage.tsx: Page component that displays a player's progress including current level, score, time, unlocked puzzles, and high scores; shows a login prompt if the user is not authenticated.
frontend/src/pages/SequenceMemoryGame.ts: Page component for the Sequence Memory game that displays a sequence for the player to reproduce, tracks time and attempts, and submits completion data to the backend.
frontend/src/pages/SettingsPage.tsx: Empty settings page file with no implemented content.
frontend/src/pages/SlidingPuzzleGame.tsx: Page component for the Sliding Puzzle game that renders a tile grid, tracks move count and elapsed time, and records level completion to the backend when the puzzle is solved.
frontend/src/pages/StroopEffectGame.tsx: Page component for the Stroop Effect game where players match text ink color against a countdown timer, tracking score and correct answers before submitting results to the backend on completion.
frontend/src/pages/SubjectsPage.tsx: Empty subjects page file with no implemented content.
frontend/src/utils/difficultyConfig.ts: Defines per-level difficulty configurations (grid size, sequence length, timers, etc.) for each game type and exports a helper function to retrieve the config for a given game type and level.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Utility functions for extracting, persisting, and clearing URL parameters from both query strings and hash-based routing, with sessionStorage fallback support.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration with dark mode, custom OKLCH-based color tokens, border radius, font family (Inter), accordion animations, and plugins for typography, container queries, and animate.
project_state.json: Project state metadata describing the current build context: multiple cognitive games exist (Stroop Effect), and a new Memory Test game is being added with specific game phases, routes, hooks, difficulty config, and image requirements.
